metaTitle: Instagram Post Generator — Fake Instagram Post Maker (Free & Private)
metaDescription: Create realistic-looking fake Instagram posts instantly in your browser. Customize username, photo, caption, likes and more. 100% private — no data sent to servers.

howto.description: Enter a username, caption, like/comment counts, and choose light or dark theme.
Upload an avatar and a post image from your device. Nothing is sent to any server.
See your fake Instagram post update instantly as you type.
Click Save to download the post as a PNG image directly to your device.

why: 100% private — your photos and data never leave your browser
Realistic Instagram UI with light and dark theme support
Real-time preview updates as you type
Custom avatar, post image, caption, likes and comments
Works completely offline after the initial page load
No watermarks, no sign-up, completely free forever

faq.q: Is this tool safe to use with my photos?
faq.a: Yes. Everything runs entirely in your browser. Your photos and personal data are never uploaded to any server.

faq.q: Can I use this on my phone?
faq.a: Absolutely. The tool is fully optimized for mobile browsers including Safari on iOS and Chrome on Android.

faq.q: Will the generated image have a watermark?
faq.a: No. The downloaded image is completely clean with no watermarks or branding.

faq.q: Can I make a dark mode Instagram post?
faq.a: Yes! You can switch between light and dark theme to match the look you want.

faq.q: Is it okay to use this for pranks?
faq.a: This tool is intended for fun and creative purposes only. Please do not use generated images to spread misinformation or harm others.

faq.q: What image formats are supported for upload?
faq.a: You can upload JPG, PNG, and WebP images for both the avatar and post image.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Photos never leave your browser memory
Supports all common image formats for upload

troubleshooting: Image not appearing? Ensure your uploaded photo is not corrupted and is in a standard format (JPG/PNG). Try re-uploading if the preview is blank.
Save button not working? This tool uses the HTML5 Canvas API. Make sure your browser is up to date and you haven't disabled JavaScript.
Text cutting off? If your caption is extremely long, some parts might not fit in the standard post view. Try shortening the text for a better visual result.
proTips: Switch to Dark Mode before saving to create a sleek, modern look for your presentation or mockup.
Use a high-quality square image (1:1 ratio) for the post photo to get the most realistic Instagram-style result.
Since this tool works entirely offline, you can safely use it to design internal marketing concepts without risking a data leak.
